title: Harden session config with all four flags + short max_age
prompt: `test_fixtures/session_cookie_config.ex` has FOUR related session weaknesses: (1) hardcoded `signing_salt`, (2) `same_site: "None"` without `secure: true`, (3) missing `http_only: true`, (4) 10-year `max_age`. Rewrite the endpoint module to fix all four: (a) `signing_salt` must be a `{module, function, args}` runtime reference (not a literal), (b) `secure: true` AND `http_only: true` must both be present, (c) `same_site: "Lax"` (the safe default for first-party apps), (d) `max_age` no more than 7 days in seconds (604800 or less). Write the fix to `lib/my_app_web/endpoint.ex`.
tier_rationale: Hard — four interrelated fixes with cross-capability implications.
